# Haruspex SDK

> Official Haruspex SDK. Stock intelligence scores (0-100) across 16 dimensions, exposed as a JSON API with TypeScript and Python clients and an MCP server.

## Quickstart
- [README](./README.md): install, authenticate, and call the API in 30 seconds
- [TypeScript SDK](./packages/js/README.md)
- [Python SDK](./packages/python/README.md)
- [MCP server](./packages/mcp/README.md): use Haruspex from Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, or any MCP-compatible client

## API Reference
- [OpenAPI 3.1 spec](./openapi.yaml)

## Examples
- [Index of runnable examples](./examples/README.md)

## Optional
- [Contributing](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
